title: 6 grep Commands for Faster Terminal Search
summary: Find the exact lines you need with grep commands for recursive search, context output, exact matches, inverted matches, and multi-pattern filters.

test_environment.runtime: grep available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Replace the example file and directory paths before running the commands.
Use sample text files with known matches to confirm each search shape.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/grep_commands_for_faster_terminal_search.sh with real files or folders.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example paths and patterns; narrow recursive searches on large projects when needed.
